ideation: This sequence will show a slight, confident adjustment of the hair, implying a self-assured and possibly even a bit playful personality.  The animation will focus on a single arm, the right, moving to adjust the hair, while the left arm remains still to emphasize the action.  The movements will be subtle and smooth, reflecting the subtle nature of the action. In the first frame, both arms will be at rest. The second frame will lift the right arm slightly to the head, rotating the wrist to touch the hair. The third frame moves the arm slightly away from the head but keeps it near. The fourth frame will show the arm returning to its resting position. This sequence will use subtle movements to suggest confidence and playfulness.

frames.beat: both arms hang relaxed at the sides
right arm lifts to casually adjust hair
fingers brush through hair, a confident gesture
right arm returns to rest, hair perfectly styled
